name: Arkadelphia Parks and Recreation Center
description: Arkadelphia Parks and Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Arkadelphia, AR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Members only — $5.00 admission if not member

name: Feaster Park
description: Feaster Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Arkadelphia, AR. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Ouachita Baptist University
description: Come play pickleball at Ouachita Baptist University in Arkadelphia, AR! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. A tennis net is available, but you’ll need to create your own lines. The courts are free.
